description: Dealfront is a B2B sales and marketing platform that combines a large European-focused contact database with website intent to surface high-fit, in-market accounts.
overview: Dealfront pairs a large B2B company and contact database with website intent signals, helping teams identify ICP-fit accounts that are ready to convert and prioritize outreach.
what_is: Dealfront is a go-to-market platform built to find and convert high-fit accounts. It draws on a large database of companies and verified contacts, with strong European coverage, and combines that with intent so teams can focus on accounts that match their ICP and are showing interest.

It is most useful for improving pipeline quality and cutting prospecting time: it reveals accounts ready to convert in real time and offers detailed targeting filters, so campaigns and outreach are aimed at genuine buyers rather than broad lists.

Dealfront acts as an account-based engine that complements CRM and marketing automation with targeting and intent data. It is not a CRM or full marketing-automation suite; its role is to raise lead quality and pipeline efficiency.
